latest.title: Coral reefs are built by tiny living builders

latest.title: Fossils turn old bones into time clues
latest.script_key: fossils can preserve a clue from deep time watch the shape in the rock because fossils form when buried remains leave mineral records behind the original body is gone but the pattern can reveal age habitat and behavior which ancient clue should we read next

latest.title: Beetles can steer by the Milky Way
latest.script_key: beetles can use the night sky like a compass watch the straight path because some dung beetles use sky patterns to keep from circling back into rivals that celestial shortcut helps a tiny insect roll food away fast would you expect a beetle to use astronomy

latest.title: Dogs read human pointing surprisingly well
latest.script_key: dogs can follow a human point fast watch the eyes check the person because dogs are unusually good at using human gestures that skill helps them cooperate with us before any command gets repeated the small glance is social intelligence not random obedience what dog skill should come next

latest.title: Fox night vision you’ve got wrong
latest.script_key: this fox s pupils aren t round they re vertical slits that s why its eyes glow green in flash shots because slit pupils cut stray light like blinds giving it perfect night vision did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: What a dog's tail says before the bark that most people miss
latest.script_key: a dog s tail is a signal not a simple happiness meter watch the first second the body pauses then the tail gives the clue in this clip the recovery angle is three dogs outdoors in most viewers watch the face but the useful signal is smaller that visible cue is the whole story so the short opens on the dog instead of stretching the setup that small detail gives the video a reason to exist

latest.title: fox night vision busts a myth
latest.script_key: watch its eyes glow red that s not red light reflecting that s blood vessels foxes see blues and greens best at night not reds that s why they spot mice against dark grass did you think their eyes glowed red because of light

latest.title: Puppies sleep to remember everything
latest.script_key: puppies lock memories while napping in grass their brains replay the day like a highlight reel that s why they wake up remembering your face faster i tried petting one 30 seconds after it woke up full tail wag no sniff test what s your dog remembering right now
